languages.original_text: "I will take him to another vault in my collection and place him in a new exhibit. I will have to select a new moment in history, in which the Rogue Trader will play the protagonist... Perhaps I will recreate the scene that is unfolding around us right now. The crumbling Museion, the phantom hope of victory that slips through his fingers at the last moment..."

languages.text: "Я заберу его в другое хранилище моей коллекции, где помещу в новую экспозицию. Мне предстоит выбрать новый эпизод истории, главным героем которого будет Вольный Торговец... быть может, я воспроизведу ту сцену, что разворачивается вокруг нас? Рушащийся Музеон, призрачная надежда на победу, которая ускользает в последний момент..."

traits.locale_text: "Я заберу его в другое хранилище моей коллекции, где помещу в новую экспозицию. languages.text: «Lo llevaré a otra cámara de mi colección y lo ubicaré en una nueva exposición. Tendré que escoger un nuevo momento histórico para que {mf|el|la} Comerciante Independiente lo protagonice... Tal vez recree la misma escena que se desarrolla ante nuestros ojos: el Museion arruinado, el atisbo de victoria que se escapa entre sus dedos en el último momento...».
languages.original_text: "I will take him to another vault in my collection and place him in a new exhibit. I will have to select a new moment in history, in which the Rogue Trader will play the protagonist... Perhaps I will recreate the scene that is unfolding around us right now. The crumbling Museion, the phantom hope of victory that slips through his fingers at the last moment..."

traits.locale_text: «Lo llevaré a otra cámara de mi colección y lo ubicaré en una nueva exposición. Tendré que escoger un nuevo momento histórico para que {mf|el|la} Comerciante Independiente lo protagonice... Tal vez recree la misma escena que se desarrolla ante nuestros ojos: el Museion arruinado, el atisbo de victoria que se escapa entre sus dedos en el último momento...».

languages.text: “我会把他带到存放藏品的另一个宝库，放进一个新的展区。我得重新挑选一个历史节点，让行商浪人成为其中的主角……也许我会重现此刻这个场景，这座摇摇欲坠的陈列馆，那缕在最后一刻从他指缝间溜走的、虚幻的胜利希望……”
languages.original_text: "I will take him to another vault in my collection and place him in a new exhibit. I will have to select a new moment in history, in which the Rogue Trader will play the protagonist... Perhaps I will recreate the scene that is unfolding around us right now. The crumbling Museion, the phantom hope of victory that slips through his fingers at the last moment..."

traits.locale_text: “我会把他带到存放藏品的另一个宝库，放进一个新的展区。我得重新挑选一个历史节点，让行商浪人成为其中的主角……也许我会重现此刻这个场景，这座摇摇欲坠的陈列馆，那缕在最后一刻从他指缝间溜走的、虚幻的胜利希望……”

languages.text: « Je l'emmènerai dans une autre chambre forte de ma collection, où il retrouvera sa place au sein d'une pièce d'exposition. Je devrai choisir un nouveau moment de l'histoire, dont {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} sera {mf|le|la} protagoniste... Je recréerai peut-être la scène que nous vivons actuellement : le Muséion en ruines, l'espoir chimérique d'une victoire qui lui file entre les doigts au dernier moment... »
languages.original_text: "I will take him to another vault in my collection and place him in a new exhibit. I will have to select a new moment in history, in which the Rogue Trader will play the protagonist... Perhaps I will recreate the scene that is unfolding around us right now. The crumbling Museion, the phantom hope of victory that slips through his fingers at the last moment..."

traits.locale_text: « Je l'emmènerai dans une autre chambre forte de ma collection, où il retrouvera sa place au sein d'une pièce d'exposition. languages.text: "Onu koleksiyonumdaki başka bir kasaya götürüp yeni bir sergiye yerleştireceğim. Hür Tacir'in başrol olacağı, tarihten yeni bir an seçmem gerekecek... Belki de tam şu an etrafımızda oluşan sahneyi yeniden yaratırım. Yıkılan Museion, son anda parmaklarının arasından kayıp giden hayaletimsi zafer umudu..."
languages.original_text: "I will take him to another vault in my collection and place him in a new exhibit. I will have to select a new moment in history, in which the Rogue Trader will play the protagonist... Perhaps I will recreate the scene that is unfolding around us right now. The crumbling Museion, the phantom hope of victory that slips through his fingers at the last moment..."

traits.locale_text: "Onu koleksiyonumdaki başka bir kasaya götürüp yeni bir sergiye yerleştireceğim. Hür Tacir'in başrol olacağı, tarihten yeni bir an seçmem gerekecek... Belki de tam şu an etrafımızda oluşan sahneyi yeniden yaratırım. Yıkılan Museion, son anda parmaklarının arasından kayıp giden hayaletimsi zafer umudu..."

languages.text: "Ich werde ihn in ein anderes Gewölbe meiner Sammlung bringen und ihn in einem neuen Exponat platzieren. Ich werde einen neuen Moment der Geschichte wählen müssen, indem der Freihändler den Protagonisten spielt ... Vielleicht empfinde ich die Szene nach, die sich gerade um uns herum entfaltet. Das bröckelnde Museion, die scheinbare Hoffnung auf den Sieg, der ihm in letzter Sekunden durch die Finger rinnt ...
languages.original_text: "I will take him to another vault in my collection and place him in a new exhibit. I will have to select a new moment in history, in which the Rogue Trader will play the protagonist... Perhaps I will recreate the scene that is unfolding around us right now. The crumbling Museion, the phantom hope of victory that slips through his fingers at the last moment..."

traits.locale_text: "Ich werde ihn in ein anderes Gewölbe meiner Sammlung bringen und ihn in einem neuen Exponat platzieren. Ich werde einen neuen Moment der Geschichte wählen müssen, indem der Freihändler den Protagonisten spielt ... Vielleicht empfinde ich die Szene nach, die sich gerade um uns herum entfaltet. Das bröckelnde Museion, die scheinbare Hoffnung auf den Sieg, der ihm in letzter Sekunden durch die Finger rinnt ...

languages.text: 「彼をコレクションの別の金庫に移動させて、新しい展示に配置します。歴史の新たな瞬間を選び、主人公に「ローグトレーダー」を据えるでしょう。今まさに私たちを取り巻く光景を再現するかもしれません。崩れゆく「ミュゼオン」、最後の瞬間、彼の指の間をすり抜ける幻の勝利の希望…」
languages.original_text: "I will take him to another vault in my collection and place him in a new exhibit. I will have to select a new moment in history, in which the Rogue Trader will play the protagonist... Perhaps I will recreate the scene that is unfolding around us right now. The crumbling Museion, the phantom hope of victory that slips through his fingers at the last moment..."

traits.locale_text: 「彼をコレクションの別の金庫に移動させて、新しい展示に配置します。歴史の新たな瞬間を選び、主人公に「ローグトレーダー」を据えるでしょう。今まさに私たちを取り巻く光景を再現するかもしれません。崩れゆく「ミュゼオン」、最後の瞬間、彼の指の間をすり抜ける幻の勝利の希望…」
